subcodes.first_line: O thou who standeth before the Countenance! Ever hath thy mention been, and will continue to be, enshrined within the Most Holy and Most Exalted Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها القائم لدی الوجه لازال ذکرت در ساحت امنع اقدس مذکور بوده و هست ذرات
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for nearness to God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
